zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Bisshop於1480年出生在英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德時，他的父親John Byshoppe16歲，母親Lady Margaret Milbourne13歲。他於1501年與Agnes De Samon在英國英格蘭賀特福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1555年1月5日在英國英格蘭素可亨費爾德享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可亨費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Bisshop于1480年出生在英国賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德时，他的父亲John Byshoppe16岁，母亲Lady Margaret Milbourne13岁。他于1501年与Agnes De Samon在英国英格兰賀特福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1555年1月5日在英国英格兰素可亨費爾德享年75岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素可亨費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Bisshop
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English bissop, biscop, Old English bisc(e)op ‘bishop’, which comes via Latin from Greek episkopos ‘overseer’. The Greek word was adopted early in the Christian era as a title for an overseer of a local community of Christians, and has yielded cognates in every European language: French évêque, Italian vescovo, Spanish obispo, Russian yepiskop, German Bischof, etc. The word came to be applied as a surname for a variety of reasons, among them a supposed resemblance in bearing or appearance to a bishop, and selection as the ‘boy bishop’ on Saint Nicholas's Feast Day. In some instances the surname is from the rare Middle English (Old English) personal name Biscop ‘bishop’. As an Irish surname it is adopted for Mac Giolla Easpaig, meaning ‘servant of the bishop’ (see Gillespie ). In North America, this surname has absorbed, by assimilation and translation, at least some of continental European cognates, e.g. German Bischoff , Polish, Rusyn, Czech, and Slovak Biskup , Slovenian Škof (see Skoff ).

variants.name: Bischoff
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Erwin, Bernhard, Hans, Klaus, Lorenz, Alois, Armin, Arno, Dieter, Fritz.

German: from Middle High German bischof, Middle Low German bischop ‘bishop’, probably applied as a nickname for someone with a pompous manner or as a metonymic occupational name for someone in the service of a bishop. See also Bishop .

variants.name: Bispo
meanings: Portuguese and Galician: nickname from bispo ‘bishop’ (see Bishop ).

variants.name: Gillespie
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Donegal): shortened Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic Mac Gille Easbuig, borrowed into Irish as Mac Giolla Easpaig, a patronymic from a personal name meaning ‘servant of the bishop’.

variants.name: Episcopo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Orazio, Pasquale, Rocco.

Italian: from episcopo ‘bishop’ (from Latin episcopus (see Bishop ), probably a nickname for someone who had a pious manner or perhaps a metonymic occupational name for someone in the service of a bishop).

variants.name: Dean
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English dene ‘valley’ (Old English denu), or a habitational name from any of several places in various parts of England named Dean or Dene from this word.

English: nickname or occupational name for the servant of a dean or nickname for someone thought to resemble a dean. A dean was an ecclesiastical official, the head of a chapter of canons or a church official with jurisdiction over a sub-division of an archdeaconry. Though no doubt some deans had illegitimate children, they were officially celibate, and in the main the surname is probably a nickname in origin, similar to Bishop , Prior , Priest , and Monk . The Middle English word deen, dien, dein, is a borrowing of Old French d(e)ien, doien from Latin decanus (originally a leader of ten men, from decem ‘ten’), and thus is a cognate of Deacon .
English: from the Middle English personal name Deyne (or Dene) a rhyming pet form of Reynald (see Reginald ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.description: The Netherlands is inherited by the future Habsburg Emperor and King of Spain Charles V.
The Catholic King Charles I of Spain ruled the Netherlands.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Bisshop was born in 1480, in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, his father, John Byshoppe, was 16 and his mother, Lady Margaret Milbourne, was 13. He married Agnes De Samon in 1501, in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He died on 5 January 1555, in Henfield, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75, and was buried in Henfield, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Bisshop est né en 1480, à Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Byshoppe, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Milbourne, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Agnes De Samon en 1501, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 5 janvier 1555, à Henfield, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Henfield, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Bisshop 1480 in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Byshoppe 16 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Milbourne 13. Er hat 1501 in Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes De Samon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 5. Januar 1555 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Henfield, Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Henfield, Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Agnes De Samon nel 1501, nel Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì il 5 gennaio 1555, nel Henfield, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Henfield, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Bisshopが1480年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアビショプ'ス ストルトフォードで生まれた時，父John Byshoppeは16歳，母Lady Margaret Milbourneは13歳であった。1501年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアでAgnes De Samonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1555年1月5日にイギリスイギリススセックスヘンフィールドで75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススセックスヘンフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Bisshop(이)가 1480년 영국 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Byshoppe(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Milbourne(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1501년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르에서 Agnes De Samon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1555년 1월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 헨필드에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 헨필드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Bisshop родился в 1480 г. в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Byshoppe было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Milbourne, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes De Samon в 1501 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Он умер 5 января 1555 г. в местности хенфиелд, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности хенфиелд, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
